shared_attributes.hitbox_margin: 3px smaller than sprite on all sides

context.role: Ground obstacle requiring player to jump, tallest and widest variant
context.screen_position: Spawns at x=650px (screen_width + 50), y=0px (ground level), scrolls left
context.usage_scenario: Challenging obstacle from game start (0+ points), spawned by SpawnSystem with 25% probability, requires precise jump timing due to 100px height exceeding player max jump (90px)

visual_specification.shape: Three vertical cacti grouped together with varying heights, widest and tallest variant
visual_specification.texture: Pixel art, hard edges, spiky protrusions on all three cacti
visual_specification.details: Three desert cacti side by side with varying heights creating irregular top silhouette, each with visible spikes, combined into single obstacle sprite, maximum difficulty variant

relationships.shared_with: Same color and style as cactus_small and cactus_medium
relationships.differences_from: cactus_small is 34x70px (1 cactus), cactus_medium is 68x70px (2 cacti). Large is 3x width of small and 30px taller, exceeds player max jump height (90px) requiring precise timing

explicit_negations: No animation or movement beyond scrolling
No transparency except full alpha channel
No spacing between the three cacti (single unified sprite)
